title: CPRA Request — Records re: Police Activity & Contacts with Villa Garcia 1415 E thousand oaks blvd  apt c

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

To the Custodian of Records,



This is a request under the California Public Records Act (Gov. Code § 7920.000 et seq.). Please produce the following records for, Jan 1, 2017 to present regarding  villa garcia 1415 e thousand oaks blvd apt c , Adonis Gaynor 11/09/1975]:



Calls for Service / CAD: All calls for service, incident logs, event numbers, call types, narratives, dispositions, and unit history for any events at the address or within 300 feet (or that list the address in the “premise history”).
Body-Worn Camera & Audio: Any BWC, in-car video, or audio for the events above. (To the extent any qualify as “critical incidents,” please process under Penal Code § 832.7(b).)  
Directed Patrol / “Hot Spot” / BOLO notes: Any patrol directives, “area checks,” proactive patrol logs, or beat-plans referencing the complex or my name.
Trespass / “No-Trespass” / Crime-Free Housing: Any trespass enforcement letters/authorizations, nuisance-abatement notices, Crime-Free Multi-Housing materials, or MOUs related to the complex.
Emails/Texts/Letters between VCSO staff and [PROPERTY MANAGER / OWNER / COMPANY NAME & EMAILS IF KNOWN] referencing the complex, me, or tenant issues (include attachments).
ALPR / CCTV hits (if any) tied to the complex cameras shared with VCSO or city systems, including policy documents governing such data.
Complaints / Use-of-Force / Misconduct records connected to any incidents at the complex that fall within SB 1421/SB 16 disclosure categories (e.g., serious use of force; sustained findings of dishonesty, bias, sexual assault, excessive force, or failure to intervene).   




Format & scope: Produce records electronically (native format where feasible). This request includes emails and ESI (attachments/metadata). If portions are exempt, please segregate and produce the non-exempt parts and cite the specific exemptions. Gov. Code § 7922.000. 



Timing: Please provide the 10-day determination and an estimated production schedule. If needed, use rolling production. Gov. Code § 7922.535. 



Preservation: This serves as a litigation hold/preservation request for the records above.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Mr. adonis gaynor
